record.field: CLM: Daily Bucket 4/5 Overdue Boundary Recompute

# Recompute balance fields on all partners that have at least one # posted bank-accepted invoice with a due date within the next 30 days # or already past due. This ensures Bucket 4 → Bucket 5 reclassification # surfaces without waiting for a user to open the partner form. # # Partners are resolved via direct SQL (no ORM read_group) to avoid # loading all partner records into memory. env.cr.execute(""" SELECT DISTINCT am.partner_id FROM account_move am WHERE am.move_type = 'out_invoice' AND am.state = 'posted' AND am.clm_bank_acceptance = TRUE AND am.payment_state NOT IN ('paid', 'in_payment', 'reversed') AND am.invoice_date_due IS NOT NULL AND am.invoice_date_due BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days' """) partner_ids = [row[0] for row in env.cr.fetchall()]
if partner_ids: partners = env['res.partner'].browse(partner_ids) # Invalidate ORM cache so next access re-runs the SQL compute partners.invalidate_recordset([ 'clm_bucket_4_balance', 'clm_bucket_5_balance', 'clm_is_frozen', 'bucket_freeze_active', ]) # Force eager recompute by reading the field (triggers _compute_clm_balances) _ = partners.mapped('clm_bucket_5_balance') env.cr.execute('SELECT 1') # flush after compute
